response: The serum and FF levels of 25OH-VD, as well as the FF levels of TNF-α and TAC, were assessed using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits following the manufacturer's instructions. These measurements were performed using a 96-well microplate ELISA reader (Dynatech. MR 7000). The 25-OHVD level in human serum was determined using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab213966, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) via a quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay method (16). The TNF-α level in human serum was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab46087, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) with the same technique (17). The TAC level in human serum was evaluated using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab65329, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) employing the quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay method (18).
